# 👋 Hi there, I'm Ethar Mahalawy

### 🚀 Data Engineer | Cloud Architecture Enthusiast | BIS Graduate

A passionate and detail-oriented **Business Information Systems (BIS)** graduate specializing in **Data Engineering and Business Intelligence**. I love transforming complex, raw data into scalable pipelines and actionable business insights.

---

### 🧠 About Me
* 🛠️ Building and optimizing robust ETL/ELT pipelines.
* ☁️ Designing data warehousing solutions and cloud architectures.
* 📊 Creating interactive dashboards for data-driven decision making.
* 🌱 Continuous learner, always exploring advanced cloud solutions and orchestration tools.

---
